body_html:
let's buy one , best options with air, yamahas 275

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Craig advised me that the base price of the 41 foot
Nautica Rib with 3 x 275
Verado Mercury engines will be approx $ 275,000 with
a 5-6 month delivery.
I asked Craig if this included the Kevlar cabin and
he said he believes so,
but has to check. I told him that he should get a
full spec of what is
included in the $275,000 price. I also told him
that if the cabin is not included,
then we need the price and the full spec for the Rib
with the cabin
included. I will follow up again today.

Darren

From: "Craig" Craig@penumbramarine.com
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
Subject: FW: 41 ft cabin
Date: Tue, 7 Mar 2006 15:22:44 -0500
